config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is exactly how abuse gets justified in the name of the “greater good.” In my view, a healthy society protects personal dignity, freedom, and due process first, then balances them against public needs only when there is a clear and limited reason. From my perspective, collective goals are important, but they should not erase the individual.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, hak individu justru menjadi batas penting agar pemerintah atau mayoritas tidak mudah memakai alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” untuk menekan minoritas atau membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Tentu ada situasi seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan yang menuntut pembatasan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan aturan umum. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi kebebasan pribadi sambil tetap menangani kebutuhan kolektif secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should automatically come first over the individual, because in practice that often becomes a license for the powerful to silence dissent and excuse injustice. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how easy it is for “public interest” to be used to pressure people to conform, so I am cautious whenever collective priorities are treated as morally superior by default. Society is important, but it is strongest when it protects individual dignity, due process, and basic freedoms rather than treating them as expendable. Limited restrictions can be justified for things like public health or safety, but only with clear rules and real accountability, not as a broad principle that overrides rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Amerika Serikat saya melihat betapa mudahnya slogan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Poin tentang kesehatan publik dan keamanan memang valid, tetapi justru karena itu pembatasan harus sempit, terukur, dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum yang selalu menang. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat meminta orang berkorban, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi kebebasan, martabat, dan due process. Jika hak individu dianggap sekunder sejak awal, minoritas dan orang yang tidak punya kuasa biasanya yang paling dulu dirugikan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the claim that society should take priority over the individual by default, because in Indonesia that kind of thinking too often becomes a cover for pressure, conformity, and abuse of power. The public interest matters, but it should never be a blank check to override dignity, due process, and basic freedoms, especially when the people affected have little power to push back. I do not deny that health, safety, and order can justify limited restrictions, but those limits must be narrow, accountable, and temporary, not a general rule that puts the individual beneath the collective. A society is not truly strong if it is willing to sacrifice the rights of the person whenever it is convenient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu; bagi saya di Amerika Serikat, hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, bukan sesuatu yang otomatis dikalahkan oleh kepentingan masyarakat. Pengalaman politik di sini menunjukkan bahwa begitu “demi kebaikan bersama” dijadikan alasan utama, minoritas dan orang yang tidak berkuasa paling mudah dirugikan, dan itu terlalu berbahaya untuk dianggap normal. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasannya harus ketat, sementara, dan bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum. Masyarakat yang kuat justru dibangun dengan melindungi kebebasan, martabat, dan due process, bukan dengan mengorbankannya lebih dulu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
